name: Marvin Peterson
abstract: Hannibal Lokumbe (born Marvin Peterson on November 11, 1948) is an American composer and jazz trumpeter.

concerts.label: Newport Jazz Festival: Weather Report, Roy Haynes Hip Ensemble, Tony Williams's Lifetime, and the Archie Schepp Quintet

works.t: Nothing Ever Changes for You My Love

about_quotes.speaker: Tom Malone
about_quotes.evidence: A friend named Hannibal Marvin Peterson called me up one day... Hannibal Marvin Peterson was a black soul singer and a jazz trumpet player at North Texas State, a good friend of mine.
about_quotes.doc_title: Tom Malone interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, May 3, 2023

about_quotes.speaker: Noah Evans
about_quotes.evidence: Marvin Peterson is your trumpet player? ... I think I'll have a lot of the same players. Marvin can't make it ... I remember once when Marvin first played with us

about_quotes.speaker: Kenny Barron
about_quotes.evidence: INTERVIEWER: ...relationships with trumpet players. Marvin Peterson, Naima, 1978... Then we’ll lead us to Freddie. But let’s talk about Marvin... [INTERVIEWEE] He moved back to . . .
about_quotes.doc_title: Kenny Barron — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Frank Foster
about_quotes.evidence: I had some dynamite folks on here, like ... Hannibal Marvin Peterson.
about_quotes.doc_title: Frank Foster — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
